baseUrl.name: dm-assistant base URL
baseUrl.hint: HTTP endpoint of your dm-assistant instance. Use http://localhost:5000 when running on the same host.

apiKey.name: dm-assistant API key
apiKey.hint: Optional. Required only if your dm-assistant is exposed beyond localhost and gated behind an API key.

campaignId.name: Campaign ID
campaignId.hint: The dm-assistant campaign to pull from. Find it in the dm-assistant sidebar.

useCampaignCodex.name: Use Campaign Codex when available
useCampaignCodex.hint: When checked and Campaign Codex is installed, route imports through CC's sheet types. Uncheck to always use native Foundry documents.

folderPrefix.name: Import folder prefix
folderPrefix.hint: Prefix for the auto-created Foundry folders that group imported content by kind. Example: 'DM Assistant' produces 'DM Assistant — NPCs', 'DM Assistant — Creatures', 'DM Assistant — Shops', etc. Empty falls back to 'DM Assistant'.

dataPathPrefix.name: Foundry Data/ upload prefix
dataPathPrefix.hint: Subfolder under Foundry's Data/ directory where imported NPC portraits and thumbnails are uploaded. Example: 'dm-assistant' puts files at Data/dm-assistant/<campaign>/npc/<slug>.png.
